title: <div>I liked your idea from the other day of only being able to remember the las
content: I liked your idea from the other day of only being able to remember the last thing about someone and can never store multiple memories. That tied into a story where you wake up and your last memory of me (which was a dream, perhaps) was that I was an 1800s confederate. That could be pretty funny lol. So any time someone dreams about someone the night before, its as if that happened. If someone does something wrong, you only have enough space in your brain to remember that last thing.
